text: The Income Capitalization Approach was developed by estimating market rent for the subject property, applying appropriate vacancy and expense allowances, and capitalizing the resulting net operating income using a market-supported capitalization rate reflective of properties of similar use, risk, and market conditions. The Income Capitalization Approach was developed on a hypothetical basis using market rent derived from CoStar data and market-supported operating expense assumptions. While this approach provides meaningful support for the value conclusion, it was afforded secondary consideration due to the owner-occupied nature of the subject property and the limited availability of directly comparable lease data for automotive repair facilities.
